top3.sql:
SELECT c.faceName, r.text, 
       CASE WHEN c.artist IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS artist_status,
       CASE WHEN c.flavorText IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS flavor_text_status,
       CASE WHEN c.text IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS oracle_text_status
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Stephen Daniel';

SELECT c.faceName, r.text, 
       CASE WHEN c.artist IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS artist_status,
       CASE WHEN c.flavorText IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS flavor_text_status,
       CASE WHEN c.text IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS oracle_text_status
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Stephen Daniel';

SELECT c.faceName, r.text, 
       CASE WHEN c.artist IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS artist_status,
       CASE WHEN c.flavorText IS NULL OR c.flavorText = '' THEN 'Missing/Empty' ELSE 'Present' END AS flavor_text_status,
       CASE WHEN c.text IS NULL OR c.text = '' THEN 'Missing/Empty' ELSE 'Present' END AS oracle_text_status
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
WHERE c.artist LIKE '%Stephen Daniel%';

SELECT c.faceName, r.text, 
       CASE WHEN c.artist IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS artist_status,
       CASE WHEN c.flavorText IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS flavor_text_status,
       CASE WHEN c.text IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS oracle_text_status
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Stephen Daniel';

SELECT c.faceName, r.text,
       CASE WHEN c.artist = 'Stephen Daniel' THEN 'Present' ELSE 'Missing' END AS artist_status,
       CASE WHEN c.flavorText IS NULL OR c.flavorText = '' THEN 'Missing or Empty' ELSE 'Present' END AS flavor_text_status,
       CASE WHEN c.text IS NULL OR c.text = '' THEN 'Missing or Empty' ELSE 'Present' END AS oracle_text_status,
       CASE WHEN c.hasFoil = 0 AND c.hasNonFoil = 0 THEN 'Degraded (no foil/non-foil flag)' ELSE 'OK' END AS foil_availability_status
FROM...

       CASE WHEN c.text IS NULL OR c.text = '' THEN 'Missing/Empty' ELSE 'Present' END AS oracle_text_status,

final.sql:
SELECT c.faceName, r.text, 
       CASE WHEN c.artist IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS artist_status,
       CASE WHEN c.flavorText IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS flavor_text_status,
       CASE WHEN c.text IS NULL THEN 'Missing' ELSE 'Present' END AS oracle_text_status
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Stephen Daniel';
